_meta.description: Universal must-know regulatory deadlines for the PAI member dashboard calendar widget. Each entry must have a verified primary or authoritative-tracker source URL. Universal-flag means 'show to all users regardless of watchlist' — per-watchlist personalisation is future work (PRI-148 phase 2).
_meta.curator_note: Seed: 2 EU entries verified against primary regulator / FLI implementation tracker. Many other 2026-Q3 dates exist (UK Online Safety Act, DORA reviews, member-state NIS2 implementation) but were not added without source-fetch verification per feedback_verify_sources_before_citing memory.

deadlines.name: EU AI Act — main provisions become applicable
deadlines.note: Remainder of the Act applies except Article 6(1); national AI regulatory sandboxes must be operational.

deadlines.name: EU Cyber Resilience Act — reporting obligations apply
deadlines.note: Article 14 reporting obligations begin applying. Main security obligations apply 2027-12-11.
